facts.summary: project-local-template contains AGENTS.md, .commandcode/, .docgen/, docs/, and scripts/.
.commandcode/ contains settings.json plus agents/, commands/, hooks/, skills/ directories.

install.mjs installProjectLocal copies the template tree into the target (skipping AGENTS.md and .commandcode/settings.json from the tree copy), appends AGENTS.md between COMMANDCODE-DOCGEN markers, and merges hooks into the target .commandcode/settings.json.
scripts/docgen.* likely delegate to the engine (mirroring the install wrapper pattern); bodies were not read.
Full content of the .commandcode overrides (agents/, commands/, hooks/, skills/, settings.json) was not read.
